Programs

Civil Aviation Transportation Management

MENU

Civil Aviation Transportation Management is a program for students who want to understand the complexity and rapidly evolving dynamics of the air transport sector in the modern world. The main objective of the program is to train individuals who aim to pursue a career in the aviation industry in accordance with national and international aviation standards by equipping them with up-to-date knowledge based on the basic principles of the sector. In this way, it aims to train highly qualified personnel who have basic knowledge in the rapidly developing aviation field, who can successfully work in the leading national and international organizations of the aviation sector from passenger services to the processes before, during and after flight operations, and who have foreign language proficiency.

Our graduates can be employed in various sectors including airline companies, airports, airport ground handling, catering and cargo companies and other aviation authorities. All of our aviation programs offer Vocational English courses and a flexible curriculum taught by our academic staff who work in leading companies in the sector. Students are provided with opportunities to do internships and make important connections in the sector, supporting them in finding a job after graduation.
